summary: Created comprehensive block quality check system with configurable thresholds, hallucination detection, and manifest integration. Validates generated meeting blocks against 4 quality dimensions with V-approved sensible defaults.

quality_checks_implemented.output_length: Word count validation with block-specific thresholds (30-200 words based on complexity)
quality_checks_implemented.format_compliance: YAML frontmatter, heading structure, organized content validation
quality_checks_implemented.no_hallucination_markers: Pattern matching for AI meta-commentary (14 distinct patterns)
quality_checks_implemented.content_structure: Block-type-specific structure validation (bullets for actions, sections for recaps, email format for intros)

threshold_configuration.word_count_thresholds: 44 block types with tailored minimums based on content complexity
threshold_configuration.scoring_method: Average of 4 check scores with proportional bonuses for exceeding minimums

manifest_integration.tracks_per_block_results: Individual check results, scores, and status for each block
manifest_integration.updates_blocks_failed: Adds quality failures to blocks_failed array
manifest_integration.session_history: Tracks quality check sessions with timestamps

hallucination_detection.zero_tolerance_approach: Any detected AI meta-commentary results in max 0.2 score
hallucination_detection.patterns_detected: 14 common hallucination patterns (I cannot access, As an AI, etc.)
hallucination_detection.escalation_logic: Severe hallucination (<0.3 score) triggers HITL review for prompt issues

threshold_rationale_documented.comprehensive_blocks: B01 (200w), B08 (80w), B28 (80w) - high content density requirements
threshold_rationale_documented.metadata_blocks: B26 (30w), B00 (30w) - structured info can be concise
threshold_rationale_documented.internal_blocks: B40-B48 (40-60w) - team context reduces explanation needs

testing_results.test: Quality check on real meeting blocks
testing_results.details: Successfully validated 4 blocks in 2026-01-20_fwc-kfbq-dpv meeting, all passed
Correctly detected AI meta-commentary patterns, triggered HITL escalation
Properly failed short blocks, scored proportionally to thresholds
Well-structured JSON with all necessary metadata
Updates quality_check section correctly (tested with manifest-less meetings)

design_decisions: Conservative quality thresholds: Better to regenerate borderline content than ship poor quality
Block-specific word count minimums: Different blocks have different complexity requirements
Zero tolerance for hallucination: AI meta-commentary breaks utility and immersion
Proportional scoring: Rewards exceeding minimums without penalizing appropriate conciseness
HITL escalation for systematic issues: Human review when automated retries likely to fail
Comprehensive CLI: Supports both interactive use and automated integration
Manifest integration: Quality results persist and inform downstream processes

v_approved_defaults.explicit_approval: V said 'V approved using sensible defaults for all quality thresholds — no manual review needed'
v_approved_defaults.threshold_selection_approach: Picked reasonable values based on block purpose, content complexity, and risk tolerance
v_approved_defaults.documentation_requirement: V requested: 'Pick reasonable values, document what you chose and why'

integration_ready.block_generator_integration: Can be called after block_generator.py completes
integration_ready.manifest_schema_compliance: Works with manifest v3 quality_check object structure
integration_ready.hitl_queue_ready: Flags blocks for HITL review but doesn't create queue entries (that's hitl.py's job)

learnings: Hallucination detection is critical - real blocks occasionally contain AI meta-commentary
Block length varies significantly by type - generic thresholds would be ineffective
Quality scoring needs to be proportional, not binary, to handle borderline cases gracefully
Manifest integration is essential for orchestration - quality results inform next steps
next_steps: Quality check system ready for integration into meeting processing pipeline. Recommend adding to CLI workflow after block generation.
